query:
-- Thu May 21: 9 blocks attached to the existing empty plan 1050001 (Indian Hill last day)
INSERT INTO scheduleBlocks (planId, blockType, subjectId, title, description, durationMin, sortOrder) VALUES
(1050001, 'morning_warmup', NULL,  'Good morning',                 'Tea, parakeets, ducks. Just settle in.', 20, 0),
(1050001, 'math',           30012, 'Spectrum Math Gr 5',           'One short page. Mom or Grandma will pick where you are. Last "real" Indian Hill day, so a little math is plenty.', 20, 1),
(1050001, 'read_aloud',     30013, 'Tuck Everlasting',             'Continue from where you left off. Try to finish the chapter.', 30, 2),
(1050001, 'custom',         NULL,  'Brain break',                  'Outside or sit-spot. Snack, water.', 15, 3),
(1050001, 'catch_up',       NULL,  'Year-end reflection',          'What you want from this year — what to keep, what to change, what to try in summer. Voice-to-text or drawing both fine. No length minimum.', 25, 4),
(1050001, 'custom',         NULL,  'Lunch',                        'Eat something good.', 30, 5),
(1050001, 'adventure',      30014, 'Duck care + nature',           'Run check, water, the surviving three. Notice what is growing in the yard. Sit with them as long as you want.', 35, 6),
(1050001, 'choice',         NULL,  'Choice block',                 'Your pick. Art, makeup, drawing, music, animals.', 25, 7),
(1050001, 'catch_up',       NULL,  'Cozy wrap-up',                 'School year, done. Anything you want to write down? Or just done.', 10, 8);

-- Fri May 22: new plan + 6 blocks (first summer-mode day)
INSERT INTO dailyPlans (date, dayType, status, notes) VALUES
('2026-05-22', 'half', 'planned', 'First summer-schooling day. Mom + Grandma teaching. Lighter pace (~2h30m). Casual intro to the /placement page so Reagan can poke at it over the summer. Surviving ducks (1 Swedish black + 2 mallards) still settling after the May 17 raccoon attack — outdoor block leaves real room for them.');

-- Fri May 22 blocks
INSERT INTO scheduleBlocks (planId, blockType, subjectId, title, description, durationMin, sortOrder)
SELECT id, blockType, subjectId, title, description, durationMin, sortOrder FROM (
  SELECT (SELECT id FROM dailyPlans WHERE date = '2026-05-22') AS id, 'morning_warmup' AS blockType, NULL AS subjectId, 'Good morning' AS title, 'Slower start. Summer pace. No rush.' AS description, 20 AS durationMin, 0 AS sortOrder
  UNION ALL SELECT (SELECT id FROM dailyPlans WHERE date = '2026-05-22'), 'custom',     NULL,  'Try the placement page',  'Open /placement. Try a few things. Skip is a real button. We are not testing you — we are checking what feels easy and what feels hard so summer is the right shape for you.', 25, 1
  UNION ALL SELECT (SELECT id FROM dailyPlans WHERE date = '2026-05-22'), 'read_aloud', 30013, 'Reading — your pick',     'Tuck Everlasting OR Michael''s World — your call.', 25, 2
  UNION ALL SELECT (SELECT id FROM dailyPlans WHERE date = '2026-05-22'), 'adventure',  30014, 'Outdoor / nature',         'Long version. Yard, ducks, creek edge if Mom or Grandma can.', 40, 3
  UNION ALL SELECT (SELECT id FROM dailyPlans WHERE date = '2026-05-22'), 'choice',     NULL,  'Choice block',             'Whatever you want.', 30, 4
  UNION ALL SELECT (SELECT id FROM dailyPlans WHERE date = '2026-05-22'), 'catch_up',   NULL,  'Cozy wrap-up',             'Optional. Skip if you are done.', 10, 5
) AS rows;

-- Verify
SELECT dp.date, dp.dayType, dp.status, COUNT(b.id) AS block_count, SUM(b.durationMin) AS total_min
FROM dailyPlans dp
LEFT JOIN scheduleBlocks b ON b.planId = dp.id
WHERE dp.date IN ('2026-05-21','2026-05-22')
GROUP BY dp.id, dp.date, dp.dayType, dp.status
ORDER BY dp.date;
